data.body:
GAP: Also update tally section (lines 626-627). Replace unconditional tally_check "ruff"/"mypy" calls with conditional:
  if [[ -n "$CMD_LINT" ]]; then
      tally_check "lint" "lint"
  else
      tally_check "ruff" "ruff"
      tally_check "mypy" "mypy"
  fi
Without this, when commands.lint is configured the lint check failure won't be captured into FAILED/FAILED_CHECKS.
